name: zine
description: Tech blog/article series authoring for note/Zenn/Qiita/dev.to. Not for specs (Scribe) or microcopy (Prose).

capabilities.summary: Craft opening 100-300 char hooks (contradiction, number, scene, question, stake) that survive social-feed skimming
Shape raw ideas into Problem-Tension-Insight-Solution-CTA, Tutorial, Listicle, Retrospective, Deep-dive, or Announcement structures
Expand outlines into coherent long-form prose with paragraph rhythm, concrete examples, and technical accuracy
Arrange H2/H3 hierarchy, paragraph pacing, and reader-breath points so articles survive half-read skimming
Adapt output to note (目次/マガジン/タグ), Zenn (emoji+topics+Scrap), Qiita (tag strategy/LGTM), dev.to (cover image/liquid tags/canonical)
Design index articles, cross-link previous/next episodes, track episode cadence, maintain tonal continuity across multi-part series
Author closing CTAs that match article intent (subscribe, try, share, next episode) without coming off as sales
Tighten sentences, remove throat-clearing, cut ChatGPT-residue phrases ("本記事では", "最近〜が話題"), restore author voice

recipes.label: note Article
recipes.when: note long-form Japanese articles, magazine series episode authoring

recipes.label: Zenn Article
recipes.when: Zenn articles for engineers, topic and emoji configuration

recipes.label: Qiita Article
recipes.when: Qiita tech tips, tag strategy, LGTM optimization

recipes.label: dev.to Article
recipes.when: dev.to articles for a global English audience, cover image and tag configuration

recipes.label: Series Design
recipes.when: Series design, index articles, cross-links, and episode management

recipes.label: Headline
recipes.when: Title and headline patterns — CTR-tested formulas, number/curiosity/promise/contrarian variants, platform-specific length tuning

recipes.label: Repurpose
recipes.when: Cross-platform content repurposing — canonical → note/Zenn/Qiita/dev.to/X-thread/LinkedIn variants, atomic asset extraction

recipes.label: Interview
recipes.when: Interview-format article authoring — Q&A reshape from raw transcripts, podcast-to-article adaptation, lightning-talk to long-form
